steps.title: Square the length conversion
steps.content:
Because this is an area rate, square the length conversion first.
$$(3.28)^2=10.7584$$
So $1$ square meter equals $10.7584$ square feet.

steps.title: Convert the hourly area rate
steps.content:
Change square feet to square meters by dividing by $10.7584$.
$$\frac{360}{10.7584}=33.46$$
The quotient is $33.46$ when rounded, so the rate is about $33.46$ square meters per hour.

steps.title: Convert hours to minutes
steps.content:
Divide the hourly rate by $60$ to get the rate per minute.
$$\frac{33.46}{60}=0.558$$
The closest listed value is $0.56$. The answer is A.
